calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Judgment Entered

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Continued To Mar-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record (525)
9:55am: Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Mercury Casualty Co., appellant, appears through Paul Van Dyke, Esq.; Worldwide Cab, respondent, appears in Pro Per through Aloizio Costa. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Appearing with Mr. Van Dyke, is a witness, previously sworn, Donald Wynatt. Mr. Van Dyke files a trial brief.
EXHA1 Weekly report dated 4/26/07
EXHA2 Notice of Loss dated 7/17/07
10:23am
Court takes a brief recess to allow parties to listen to a tape re claim.
10:28am
Court reconvenes, all present
EXHA3 7/31/07 transcript of tape referenced above
EXHA4 Weekly report dated 8/1/07
Mr. Van Dyke is to to provide a copy of the policy to Mr. Costa and Judge Myles. The policy is to be FAX'd to Judge Myles at: 510-986-0843; if over 20 pages it is to be mailed to Myles Law Firm, PO box 11094, Oakland, CA 94611. Matter is continued to Mar-06-08, 9am, Dept. 525, before Judge Myles. If judgment is rendered before then, matter will go off calendar.
10:50am
Matter is submitted, evidence is retained. The court orders a change of address for Mr. Costa in this case, as well a related case: 822838. (Worldwide Cab no longer exists.) The clerk asks Mr. Costa to write his correct address for the Court and it will be placed in the file.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-30-2007 Judgment Entered
